question: Did we receive payment from Deborah Dixon partnership Last fiscal year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) 
FROM master_txn_table 
WHERE Customers = 'Deborah Dixon partnership' 
  AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year') AND date('now','-1 year');
gold_sql: select transaction_id from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'payment' and customers = "Deborah Dixon" and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')

question: How many Inorganic Gases did we sell to Kevin White Last month?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Kevin White' 
  AND products.Product_Service_type = 'Inorganic Gases' 
  AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 month','start of month') AND date('now','-1 month','end of month');
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Kevin White" and product_service = 'Inorganic Gases' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month", "-1 months") AND date( current_date, "start of month", "-1 days")

question: What our monthly spend on Carla Whitaker
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend, strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS Month
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Carla Whitaker'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE)
ORDER BY Month ASC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Carla Whitaker" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')

question: When was the last time we sold Duplexes
generated_sql:
SELECT MAX(transaction_date) AS last_sale_date
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Product_Service = 'Duplexes' AND Credit > 0
GROUP BY Product_Service;
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "Duplexes" order by transaction_date desc limit 1

question: What our monthly spend on Ryan Estrada
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Ryan Estrada'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now', 'start of month', '+1 month')
group by strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE)
ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) ASC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Ryan Estrada" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')

question: What our monthly spend on Corey Sampson
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Corey Sampson'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE)
ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Corey Sampson" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')

question: When was the last time we sold Tablets
generated_sql: SELECT MAX(transaction_date) AS last_sale_date FROM master_txn_table WHERE Product_Service = 'Tablets' AND Transaction_TYPE = 'Sale' GROUP BY Product_Service;
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "Tablets" order by transaction_date desc limit 1

question: Did we receive payment from Amy Howard partnership This quarter to date?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) 
FROM master_txn_table 
WHERE Customers = 'Amy Howard partnership' 
  AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN DATE('now', 'start of quarter') AND DATE('now');
gold_sql: select transaction_id from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'payment' and customers = "Amy Howard" and transaction_date >= strftime('%Y-%m-%d', strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') || '-' || substr('00' || (((strftime('%m', 'now') - 1) / 3) * 3 + 1), -2, 2) || '-01')

question: When was the last time we sold Musicians
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "Musicians" order by transaction_date desc limit 1

question: How many Securities did we sell to Helen Pennington Last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) 
FROM master_txn_table 
WHERE Customers = 'Helen Pennington' 
  AND Transaction_TYPE = 'Sale' 
  AND Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income') 
  AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year') AND date('now');
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Helen Pennington" and product_service = 'Securities' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-12 months", "start of month") AND date( current_date, 'start of month', '-1 day')

question: When was the last time we sold Fishing
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "Fishing" order by transaction_date desc limit 1

question: How many Livestock did we sell to David Hanson in jan this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'David Hanson' 
  AND products.Product_Service_type = 'Livestock' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', 'start of year');
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "David Hanson" and product_service = 'Livestock' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+1 month', '-1 day')

question: How many Macs did we sell to Debra Velez Last 12 months?

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT master_txn_table.Transaction_ID)

WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Debra Velez' 
  AND products.Product_Service = 'Mac'

question: What our monthly spend on Mark Banks
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Amount) AS Monthly_Spend, strftime('%Y-%m', Transaction_DATE) AS Month
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Mark Banks'
AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY Month
ORDER BY Month ASC
LIMIT 12;
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Mark Banks" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')
